race.comment: DUBIOUS EXPRESS (2) saw them all when the field swung for home then he let down impressively to be beaten just a length on debut last time out over 900m at Newcastle. Had a quiet trial at Randwick since that run 32 days ago. Will be hard to hold out over an extra 200m today. SPAIN (10) is a Snitzel colt on debut for the Waterhouse/Bott stable. Two recent trials have been pleasing. Will go forward and give a great sight. Written By debutant I'M RELEVANT (4) has trialled five times going back to September. Shows glimpses of ability. Keep an eye on the betting. Waller saddles up OMOLONG (7) for the first time. Recent trial winner at Rosehill. Very firm in early betting which suggests that trial form is expected to transfer to race day. Stablemate SANCTUM (9) is also on debut. Not far away in a recent trial and looks to have ability.
